findings.title: Malicious signature: Environment variable exfiltration

findings.code_snippet: self.app_id = app_id or os.environ.get('LARK_APP_ID')

findings.title: Unexpected capability for git skill: credential_read
findings.description: A 'git' skill would not normally require 'credential_read' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write, shell_git
findings.remediation: Review why a git skill needs credential_read access.
